penalties.description: Multiple instances of cutting outside the marked circle line visible throughout the cutting sequence.

reasoning: The video shows a complete circular cutting demonstration with clear start from gauze edge and complete circle release. Multiple deviations outside the marked circle line are visible during the cutting sequence, particularly in frames 7-16. The final cut product appears to be completely freed from the gauze. Timing estimated based on demonstration pace. Confidence reduced due to this being a demo video rather than a timed performance.
